name: Marinated Ginger Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lemon juice, vegetable oil, soy sauce, grated ginger root (or ground ginger), onion salt, and garlic powder in a bowl.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat evenly.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 4 hours.
4. When ready to cook, preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C) or heat oil in a skillet on the stovetop.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade, allowing excess to drip off.
6. Cook the chicken until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C), turning occasionally.
7. Once cooked, remove from the oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
